description_long: This is a brown, wide-brimmed hat with a tall, cylindrical crown and a flat top. The brim is broad and extends evenly around the entire circumference, providing ample shade. The crown is straight-sided, lacking any pinches or indentations, and the transition between the crown and brim is smooth and unadorned. The surface appears matte and uniform, with no visible decorative elements, stitching, or textural variation. The hat is likely made from felt or a similar soft material, giving it a semi-soft structure. Its simple, utilitarian design suggests it is intended for practical use, such as sun protection in urban or outdoor settings.
description: A brown, wide-brimmed hat with a tall, flat-topped cylindrical crown and a smooth, matte finish. The design is simple and unadorned, emphasizing practicality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat brim and tall, cylindrical crown with no visible decorations.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the even width of the brim and the smooth transition between crown and brim.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, highlighting the symmetrical shape and lack of embellishments.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the consistent height of the crown and the broad, flat brim.
